movie.actors: Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite, Dina Meyer
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 3 wins & 7 nominations.
movie.plot: The last dragon and a disillusioned dragonslaying knight must cooperate to stop an evil king who was given partial immortality.
movie.title: DragonHeart
movie.writer: Patrick Read Johnson (story), Charles Edward Pogue (story), Charles Edward Pogue (screenplay)
